title: Build Powerful AI Without Coding
modules: What Is a Workflow and Why Build One?
When the Workflow Breaks — Debug It
Ethics Check: Should This Be Automated?
Launch Your Workflow, Present Your Case
synopsis: You're a startup founder with a real problem and zero engineers — so you must build an AI-powered workflow using no-code tools to solve it before your pitch meeting. Each module adds a new layer of complexity, and you'll defend every automation decision in a final board-room scenario.
rationale: No-code AI tools are rapidly democratizing automation for careers and entrepreneurship, but teenagers have almost no structured exposure to workflow thinking, tool chaining, or the ethical questions automation raises.
learning_outcome: Students can design, build, and critically evaluate a multi-step AI workflow using at least two no-code tools, and articulate one ethical risk their workflow creates.
source_signals: Launch HN: AgentHub (YC W24) – A no-code automation platform
How to learn AI for students & professionals (guide)
New White House commitments empower teachers, students, and job seekers through AI skilling and learning
